_meta: Scene blueprint — read by animation_engine.py and frame_generator.py

dialogue.line: Okay okay... but what's actually inside you? What makes you work?

frame.MrWilly_pose: standing right of frame, arms crossed over chest, leaning forward slightly, skeptical
frame.MrWilly_expression: skeptical but intrigued, one eyebrow cocked, slight smirk
frame.Xpel_pose: standing on table left of frame, one arm raised with finger pointing up as if to answer, eager expression
frame.Xpel_expression: eager to answer, eyes bright, leaning slightly toward MrWilly
frame.camera_angle: medium two-shot, slight push in on both characters

camera_motion.movement: slow push in toward the pair, tightening to closer two-shot

character_motion.MrWilly: arms cross tighter, weight shifts back slightly onto heels, chin drops slightly skeptical, single blink
character_motion.Xpel: finger points up, slight excited bounce, tiny body leans toward MrWilly
